verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who is there Jesus That reigns above you? Who has the power and Wisdom you do?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You rule forever You’re seated on high I fall before you My spirit cries there is

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: No throne Higher than your throne No kingdom Greater than yours There is no throne Higher than your throne You are Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You gaze with love upon All hearts of faith You show such mercy Compassion and grace

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Yet there’s perfect justice at Your judgement seat All kings and nations are Under your feet there is

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Bridge Lord of all Lords King of all Kings Now and forever the universe sings Lord of all Lords King of all Kings With all creation your children sing
